This project aims to provide an open source natural science audience aimed all-in-one solution for the calculation of scattering factors from DFT or wavefunction methods.
Recent updates include OCC as an on-board wavefunction calculator for on-the-fly generation of information.
Attack safety is not the top priority, but speed and robustness, as well as sanity chek of inputs are improtant!

Copilot prompt and triage notes are kept in `.github/copilot-memory/`.
Start with `.github/copilot-memory/README.md` for an index.
Use these files for focused guidance:
- `.github/copilot-memory/nosphera2-copilot.md`
- `.github/copilot-memory/nosphera2-cpp-prompts.md`
- `.github/copilot-memory/nosphera2-ci-triage-prompts.md`
- `.github/copilot-memory/nosphera2-review-prompts.md`
